title: Xtra Sweet Middle Eastern Eggs Shakshuka
description: A sweet and savory Middle Eastern dish featuring eggs, parmesan cheese, and a blend of spices, perfect for a midnight craving. This plant-based friendly recipe is cooked to perfection on a yakimono grill.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet on the grill.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the canned crushed tomatoes, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Create 4 wells in the tomato mixture and pour the whisked eggs into each well.
Sprinkle the shredded parmesan cheese over the eggs.
Cover the skillet with a lid and cook for 10-12 minutes, until the eggs are set.
